---
id: get-gateway-connect-address
title: "查询网关入网服务地址"
description: "查询网关入网时需要连接的 CoAP 服务地址，以及 Studio 的 mDNS域名与hostId；客户端在发起网关入网前应先调用此接口获取服务地址"
sidebar_label: "查询网关入网服务地址"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: i18n/zh/docusaurus-plugin-content-docs/version-Beta/aqara-api/data-export-api/data-export-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"查询网关入网服务地址"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/gateways/connect/address"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



查询网关入网时需要连接的 CoAP 服务地址，以及 Studio 的 mDNS域名与hostId；客户端在发起网关入网前应先调用此接口获取服务地址

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"请求发起成功","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type","version","msgId","code"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"消息类型"},"version":{"type":"string","description":"接口版本","example":"v1"},"msgId":{"type":"string","description":"消息 ID"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"业务状态码，0 表示成功"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"提示信息"}},"title":"BaseResponse"},{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"object","required":["ip","port","mdnsDomain","hostId"],"properties":{"ip":{"type":"string","description":"CoAP服务IP地址","example":"192.168.1.100"},"port":{"type":"integer","description":"CoAP 服务端口号","example":5684},"mdnsDomain":{"type":"string","description":"mDNS 域名","example":"http://192.168.1.100:8080"},"hostId":{"type":"string","description":"Studio（宿主）实例标识","example":"studio-a1b2c3d4e5f6"}},"title":"GatewayConnectAddressData"}}}],"example":{"type":"GatewayConnectAddressResponse","version":"v1","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-00000000000f","code":0,"message":"success","data":{"ip":"192.168.1.100","port":5684,"mdnsDomain":"http://192.168.1.100:8080","hostId":"studio-a1b2c3d4e5f6"}},"title":"GatewayConnectAddressResponse"},"examples":{"success":{"value":{"type":"GatewayConnectAddressResponse","version":"v1","msgId":"2df2f431-a58d-4fdb-b39c-4f0d29e7ecf0","code":0,"message":"success","data":{"ip":"192.168.1.100","port":5684,"mdnsDomain":"http://192.168.1.100:8080","hostId":"studio-a1b2c3d4e5f6"}}}}}}},"400":{"description":"请求参数错误","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"example":{"type":"ErrorMessage","version":"v1","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-err000000001","code":400,"message":"参数
